name: 求生匕首（★） | 表面淬火
nameZh: 求生匕首（★） | 表面淬火
descriptionEn: This multi-purpose tactical knife features a serrated edge for ripping through coarse material like bone or fiber, plus a sharp gutting hook. The composite material handle is bolted to the blade with hex nuts. It has been color case-hardened through the application of wood charcoal at high temperatures. A little color never hurt anyone
descriptionZh: 这把多功能战术匕首，采用骨头或纤维等粗糙材料打造成锯齿刀刃及一个锋利的穿肠钩。复合材料握把上还拴了带有六角螺母的刀片。 通过木炭在高温下的应用，这把武器已被彩色表面淬火。 一点彩色痕迹无伤大雅
